title: High Society
description: Lady Emberlyn is hosting a masquerade ball in Thornfield. A priceless family heirloom - the Emberlyn Sapphire - will be on display. Infiltrate the party, steal the sapphire, and escape without being identified.

objectives.description: Acquire an invitation to the masquerade (steal, forge, or purchase)
Locate the Emberlyn Sapphire on display
Steal the sapphire without raising alarm

challenge.description: Must blend in with nobles, avoid suspicion, time the theft perfectly
challenge.detection_consequences: Identified as thief, bounty placed, quest failure

optional_objectives.description: Replace sapphire with fake before it's noticed (buys more time)
Steal from other guests while at party

notes: High-stakes social stealth mission. Multiple skill checks. Emberlyn Estate in Thornfield. Rewards Shadow Cloak (stealth bonus item).
